positive_scenarios.expected_result: User is successfully authenticated and redirected to the dashboard/home page with an active session
steps: Verify the login page is displayed with username and password fields
Enter the valid password in the password field
Verify the user is redirected to the home/dashboard page
Verify the authenticated user session is established (e.g., username or profile icon is visible)
positive_scenarios.title: Successful login with valid username and password

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Login is prevented and an error message indicating the username/email field is required is displayed
steps: Verify the login page is displayed
Enter the valid password in the password field
Verify an appropriate error message is displayed (e.g., 'Email is required' or 'Username cannot be empty')
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with empty username/email field
